soul_pools.description: A collection of soul pools that define which souls can appear in specific situations or rewards.

id.description: Unique identifier for this soul pool. Used to reference this pool from other parts of the game.

items.description: Reference to an soul's unique identifier that can appear in this pool (must be of type soul).

relics.description: List of soul references that can appear in this pool.

items.description: A soul pool definition that specifies which souls can appear together.
